_publications._publicationTitle: Human cutaneous neurofibroma matrisome revealed by single-cell RNA sequencing.

_contextSnippet: To identify the shared clusters (and associated cell types) we integrated all the samples using Seurat.
details: Successfully integrated all samples and identified 6 major cell types including Schwann cells, endothelial cells, hematopoietic cells, pericytes, antigen-presenting cells, and fibroblasts
